item.title: Version 0.5.36
item.description:
What's New in 0.5.36

# Release Notes for Version 0.5.36

Features

  • Light/Dark Mode Support: Enhanced user experience with the addition of light and dark mode support for Sparkle update release notes.
  • Inline HTML Release Notes: Improved accessibility by using inline HTML release notes in Sparkle, allowing direct viewing instead of being redirected to the GitHub releases page.

    • Improvements

  • Updated Sparkle Framework: Upgraded to Sparkle framework version 2.9.0 to resolve issues with the PKG updater.
  • DiagnosticKit App Detection: Improved compatibility by stripping the development rpath from the Sparkle binary.

    • Fixes

  • Release Notes Generation: Resolved issues related to the generation of release notes and the appcast content pipeline.
  • Rosetta Arch Check: Fixed a failing architecture check during preinstall/postinstall phases under Rosetta.
  • AU Validation and Installer Improvements: Addressed AU validation timeout issues, crashes in the PKG installer, and resolved Sparkle updater problems.
    • --- Source: `unknown` on `unknown` ([view commit](https://github.com/danielraffel/PlunderTube/commit/unknown))

    Build 1096 · unknown on unknown
